commit.message:
Remove codecompanion/ACP setup, fix mise script ordering

ACP providers (claude-agent-acp, codex-acp, amp-acp) all require
separate paid API keys rather than reusing CLI OAuth — not worth it.
Also removes autopep8 from conform.nvim and relocates mise install
script to dot_config/mise/ so it sorts after its config file during
chezmoi apply.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

SwiftMem v3: RRF fusion, vDSP cosine, HyDE, temporal queries, contradiction detection

- HybridSearch: Replace linear score blend with Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) over
  3 ranked lists: vector, BM25, graph-neighbors — research-backed fusion (k=60)
- HybridSearch: Replace scalar cosine loop with vDSP_dotpr (Accelerate) — 10-40x faster
- HybridSearch: Add graph-neighbor search as 3rd RRF list (1-hop from top-5 seeds)
- Reranker: Replace step-function recency with exponential decay per memory type
  (static: 0.9999/hr ≈ 289-day half-life; dynamic: 0.99/hr ≈ 3-day half-life)
- LLMService: Add generateHypotheticalDocument() for HyDE query expansion
- SwiftMemAPI.search(): HyDE blends hypothetical embedding 50/50 with query embedding
- SwiftMemAPI.search(): Auto-parse temporal expressions ("last week", "yesterday", etc.)
  via new TemporalQueryParser, inject DateInterval filter on results
- SwiftMemAPI.search(): New temporalFilter parameter for explicit date range override
- SwiftMemAPI.search(): Remove 0.3 score threshold (incompatible with RRF ~0.016 scores)
- SwiftMemAPI.add(): Fire-and-forget contradiction detection via MemoryExtractor
- MemoryExtractor: Contradiction detection with LLM confirm + heuristic fallback
- MemoryGraphStore: Bi-temporal schema — valid_at/invalid_at on memory_relationships
- MemoryGraphStore: Idempotent v3 migration (ALTER TABLE + backfill + index)
- MemoryGraphStore: invalidateRelationship() for soft-delete of superseded facts
- MemoryGraphStore: getMemoriesInDateRange() for temporal query support
- MemoryGraphStore: loadRelationshipsIntoGraph() filters WHERE invalid_at IS NULL
- Config: MemoryDecayConfig, SwiftMemConfig.rrfK/memoryDecayConfig/contradictionThreshold
- Config: LLMConfig.enableHyDE / hydeMaxTokens flags
- New file: TemporalQueryParser.swift — 12 temporal patterns, cleanedQuery output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update pitch deck with new 6-stream revenue model

commit.message:
fix(btc): get settlement outcome directly from Polymarket API

Instead of guessing settlement from our BTC price snapshot,
now queries gamma-api.polymarket.com for the definitive outcome.

outcomePrices ['1','0'] = UP won, ['0','1'] = DOWN won.
This is the source of truth — it's what Polymarket actually resolved.

Falls back to price snapshot only if Polymarket API is unavailable.
Tracks source: 'polymarket' vs 'price-snapshot' in settlementSource.

feat: route EFA through order pipeline + guard broker state writes

- EFA buys/sells now use _submit_order() with proper Order objects
  (commission, audit trail, IBKR-compatible)
- EFA tracked in broker.positions instead of separate self.efa_position
- load_state: PaperBroker restores from JSON, IBKR uses broker as truth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: handle S/MIME signed and encrypted emails in Gmail body extraction [bu-3np] (#531)

- Skip application/pkcs7-signature and application/pgp-signature parts
  during multipart recursion so detached signature bytes are never treated
  as body content (fixes multipart/signed emails where signature comes first)
- Return descriptive fallback '(S/MIME encrypted body — cannot extract)' and
  log a warning for application/pkcs7-mime (opaque S/MIME) where body cannot
  be decoded without the recipient private key
- Add _SIGNATURE_MIME_TYPES class attribute covering pkcs7, pgp, and legacy
  x-pkcs7 variants
- Add 6 new tests covering: detached S/MIME, signature-first ordering, PGP
  detached, opaque pkcs7-mime fallback, warning logging, and malformed
  all-signature multipart

commit.message:
feat: facility filter dropdowns + playbook list optimization (#144)

* feat: facility filter Select2 dropdowns with ARTCC grouping (NOD, Route)

Replace plain text origin/destination filter inputs with Select2 dropdowns
grouped by DCC region on both NOD and Route pages. Adds ARTCC canonical
alias resolution for accurate filtering (e.g. ZNY alias matches ZNY).
Also fixes playbook solid-line rendering and adds TRACON pseudo-fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: skip route aggregation for large playbook result sets

When listing >500 plays (e.g. FAA_HISTORICAL with 3000+), skip the
GROUP_CONCAT route aggregation JOIN entirely to prevent PHP OOM on
B1ms tier. Play-level metadata remains searchable; route details load
on demand via get.php.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: normalize facility aliases in playbook search/filter

Normalize FAA/alias ARTCC codes to ICAO canonical format across all
playbook search and filter paths:
- list.php: CZU→CZUL, CZE→CZEG etc. for ARTCC filter parameter
- playbook.js: normalize qualified search terms (orig:CZU → CZUL)
- playbook-cdr-search.js: normalize ARTCC filter inputs

Covers all Canadian (8), US oceanic (6), Mexican (5), and Caribbean (1)
facility aliases matching facility-hierarchy.js ALIAS_TO_CANONICAL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Canadian ARTCC normalization to CADENA import

Apply normalizeCanadianArtccCsv() to origin_artccs, dest_artccs, and
facilities_involved during CADENA PASA import. Route strings are NOT
normalized because CZM in CADENA routes is the Cozumel VOR, not the
Canadian Moncton ARTCC.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: normalize US ARTCC ICAO codes (KZNY->ZNY, PAZA->ZAN) in playbook write paths

Add K-prefix stripping and PAZA->ZAN mapping to normalizeCanadianArtcc()
across all 5 playbook PHP files. Replace inline K-stripping in save.php
and recompute_traversed.php with the centralized function. Also normalize
facilities_involved on save to prevent K-prefixed codes from entering DB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct boundary layer z-order and default visibility

- route-maplibre.js: Fix layer stacking so super centers render above
  ARTCC/FIR, which renders above sub-areas, above deep sub-areas
  (was: super incorrectly inserted below fir via beforeId)
- route-maplibre.js: Default ARTCC/FIR labels to visible
- playbook.js: Default region colors toggle to on
- playbook.js: Include fill + label layers in hierarchy toggle handler
  (was only toggling line layers, missing fills and labels)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- anthropic_parser: add cache_read_input_tokens and cache_creation_input_tokens
  to usageBlock; total input = input_tokens + cache_read + cache_creation
  (per Anthropic protocol §4.1 — input_tokens alone is not the full input)
- Same fix applied to non-streaming ParseNonStreaming path
- Add 3 new tests covering cache token scenarios (SSE + non-streaming)
- dashboard/usage_handler: new session-auth endpoints for my-usage page
  (/api/dashboard/active-users, /api/dashboard/user-quota, /api/dashboard/user-history)
- my-usage.html: switch fetch() calls to new session-authenticated endpoints,
  add guard checks, fix initialization to wait for user selection
- handler.go: fix avgMonthly division by zero for users with < 30 days history
- cmd/cproxy,sproxy: fail fast with human-readable error when debug_file
  directory does not exist
- cmd/sproxy: hoist apiKeyRepo and call SetLLMTargetRepo/SetAPIKeyRepo on
  dashboard handler so LLM target list renders correctly

commit.message:
feat: implement react-capture per-segment automated browser recording

Add Playwright-based per-segment video capture to the pipeline, enabling
automated recording of individual React scene segments (14 clips) instead
of requiring manual screen recording.

Client-side: Add ?scene=N&segment=M URL routing for isolated scene/segment
rendering. Scene5 and Scene6 gain segment isolation props. Export
SCENE_DURATIONS and SEGMENT_DURATIONS from VideoTemplate.

Pipeline-side: New react-capture.ts module with Vite server management,
per-segment Playwright capture, WebM-to-MP4 conversion, clip caching,
and concatenation. Integrated into pipeline orchestrator and CLI.

Also adds pipeline/ directory (production CLI), PRD, CLAUDE.md, and
agent plans/guides.

Replace article editor with WYSIWYG — edit directly on the rendered page

rename need-input skill to spark

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reduce MuViT tiling artifacts with configurable blend modes and wider overlap

MuViT's global self-attention makes predictions tile-dependent, causing visible
boundary artifacts. This adds model-type-aware blending: ViTs automatically use
cosine-bell (GAUSSIAN) weights across the full overlap zone (was linear/32px),
and MuViT defaults increase overlap to 64px (25%). A new CENTER_CROP mode keeps
only center predictions for artifact-free results at ~4x speed cost.

commit.message:
fix: resolve 51 findings from 6-pass codebase review

Critical fixes:
- Fix bulk retry check_limit wrong arguments (100% failure rate)
- Fix billing portal URL using numeric ID instead of store slug
- Fix webhook idempotency TOCTOU race (atomic SET NX)
- Align SocialPost/SocialPostTarget types with backend schema
- Fix ProjectMember stack (add GET endpoint, fix PUT→PATCH, field names)
- Guard LemonSqueezy adapter against missing timestamps
- Fix RSS feed XML injection (escape author/category names)

Security:
- Add rate limit to public agency portal endpoint
- Escape all XML fields in RSS feed with xml.sax.saxutils

Performance:
- Add 5 composite DB indexes (migration 057)
- Fix N+1 in generation tracker, bulk delete, content decay
- Reuse Redis connection in social scheduler
- Debounce analytics date range, O(1) cache eviction
- Change Project model relationships to lazy="select"

Code quality:
- Replace toast.error string literals with parseApiError (60 fixes, 24 files)
- Remove 3 example_usage.py dead code files
- Clean up LemonSqueezy adapter (remove 3 dead methods, fix logging)
- Deduplicate slugify, tier logic, usage field maps
- Fix design token violation (bg-white → bg-surface)
- Gate Tags/Reports in sidebar to professional tier

commit.message:
fix(btc): accurate settlement — use BTC price at actual settlement time

Was using 'current price' at check time (potentially 30s+ after
settlement). Now:

1. Records BTC price every tick (~1s) into a ring buffer
2. At settlement, finds the price closest to the actual settlement
   timestamp (within 10s tolerance)
3. Falls back to current price only if no snapshot available

Also tightened:
- Check interval: 30s → 10s
- Backfill window: 10min → 2min (stale prices are inaccurate)
- Grace period: 5s → 3s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4 <noreply@anthropic.com>
